implemented_optimizations.name: Certification Ledger Review Consolidation
implemented_optimizations.implementation: The optimized economics run records a single certified-runtime and certification-ledger review action instead of separately counting a certification artifact review action.

implemented_optimizations.name: Prompt-as-Approval Measurement Authorization
implemented_optimizations.implementation: The economics runtime now records measurement_prompt_authorized=true so explicit human measurement prompts authorize measurement without adding a duplicate approval action.

implemented_optimizations.name: Replay Artifact Scope Separation
implemented_optimizations.implementation: The economics runtime now records validation_artifacts separately and excludes them from replay-overhead counts while preserving validation evidence visibility.

measurement_rationale: The implemented runtime distinguishes source replay artifacts from validation artifacts, records prompt-authorized measurement without duplicate approval, and supports consolidated certification-ledger review inputs. The after measurement preserves certification and replay references while lowering total overhead actions from 12 to 9.
remaining_limits: Token impact remains deterministic proxy accounting, not provider billable token telemetry.
Operator effort remains action-count accounting, not wall-clock labor measurement.
Further reductions should not remove replay certification, regression certification, or human approval gates.
